positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a diverse gathering of enchanted forest creatures—friendly foxes, glowing fireflies, hummingbirds, and miniature deer—interacting in a bioluminescent woodland scene. The composition should be highly centralized and symmetrical, designed for a cohesive repeating pattern. Use a deep color palette dominated by emerald greens, sapphire blues, amethyst purples, and pops of gold light. The style should be sophisticated watercolor and line art combination, with clean, solid silhouettes and subtle glow effects. Focus on strong contrast between the dark, detailed background foliage and the brightly illuminated subjects. Vector art quality, high detail, perfect for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, text, logo, watermark, signature, lowres, artifact, ugly, bad anatomy, multiple limbs, extra digits, monochrome, grainy, distorted
